oauth2-openapi.description: Standard Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. Example: "PersonalAccessToken {token}"
oauth2-openapi.name: Authorization

tags.name: OpenApi
tags.description:
This API includes real-time event notifications using SignalR.
                                            Clients can subscribe to the following SignalR channels:

                                            - **DeviceStateInfo**: Receives real-time device state updates.
                                            - **QueueInfo**: Notifies about job queue changes.
                                            - **JobQueueEntryStateInfo**: Sends updates when a job enters the queue.

                                             SignalR Hub URL: {example}/publicTrotecNotification
                                             Public Trotec Notification schemas (available below in the schemas section)
                                             - DeviceStateInfo
                                             - JobQueueEntryInfo
                                             - JobQueueEntryStateInfo
                                             - JobQueueInfo
                                             - PublicApiError
